name: twinharness
description: TwinHarness — Agentic SDLC Orchestrator. A Claude Code plugin: prompt orchestration (13 specialized agents) plus a deterministic `th` CLI for all mechanical enforcement (state, hashing, anchors, traceability, coverage, drift, cascade-staleness).
author: JrSneed28 (https://github.com/JrSneed28)

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test && git diff --exit-code dist/
